description: Mailforge is a cold email infrastructure tool that provisions hundreds of domains and mailboxes with automated DNS setup in minutes, delivering high inbox placement for outreach campaigns.
tagline: Cold email infrastructure ready in minutes
overview: Mailforge lets sales teams and agencies stand up a full cold email infrastructure, including hundreds of domains and mailboxes with automated DNS configuration, in as little as five minutes, providing premium deliverability at lower cost than traditional Google or Outlook setups.
what_is: Mailforge is a cold email infrastructure platform designed to help businesses of all sizes launch and manage multi-domain outreach operations. It automates DNS configuration, supports unlimited mailboxes, and includes SSL and domain masking, all built to maximize inbox placement. The platform is positioned as a cost-efficient alternative to provisioning mailboxes through Google Workspace or Microsoft 365.

Teams can have a fully configured cold outreach infrastructure ready in five minutes, making it practical to scale quickly without deep technical knowledge. The distributed email architecture reduces the risk of deliverability problems that arise when sending volume is concentrated on too few domains or IP addresses. Both new users and experienced operators find the setup process straightforward.

Mailforge works alongside any cold email sending software and pairs well with CRM tools to support a complete outbound sales pipeline. For teams that need mainstream Google or Microsoft mailbox integration rather than dedicated cold-outreach infrastructure, Primeforge is the companion product. Mailforge itself is built specifically for scaling cold outreach, not transactional or subscriber-based email sending.
